name: Ground Beef-Green Beans One Dish Meal
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sliced mushrooms or water chestnuts
2 cans diluted cream of mushroom soup with 1 1/2 cans water or milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef, onion, celery, and mushrooms or water chestnuts.
2. Place half of the meat mixture in the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
3. Add green beans to the pan.
4. Cover with the remaining meat mixture.
5. Pour the diluted mushroom soup over everything.
6. Sprinkle Tater Tots on top.
7. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until the casserole is bubbly and the potatoes are crispy.
